nova-ai.studio / chat

You

Help me design a clean design system.

Nova AI

Great! A clean design system starts with: Tokens (colors, spacing, typography), Components (buttons, inputs, cards), and Patterns (layout, navigation). Want me to draft a color palette?

Nova AI

Multi-provider AI

One workspace. Three powerful engines.

Switch AI providers seamlessly — each optimised for different tasks, languages, and contexts.

Grok

llama-3.3-70b

Fast, reasoning-focused AI by xAI. Ideal for structured tasks and creative problem solving.

Sarvam

sarvam-30b

India-built multilingual AI optimised for South Asian languages, translation, and local context.

Ollama

local · llama3.2-3b

Run open-source models locally. Perfect for offline workflows and privacy-first applications.

Everything you need

Built for the modern AI workflow.

Premium chat experience

A refined dark-mode interface built for clarity, performance, and beautiful AI responses.

Secure authentication

Cookie-based sessions and modern auth flows keep your conversations private and safe.

Multi-provider AI

Switch between Grok, Sarvam, and Ollama in one click. One workspace, infinite capability.

Voice recognition

Speak your thoughts. Native speech-to-text converts your voice into polished prompts.

File attachments

Upload documents, code, and images to provide rich context to any AI request.

Blazing fast

Optimized for speed with Next.js 15 Turbopack, instant session switching, and live search.

Simple pricing

Start free. Upgrade when ready.

Free

Great to explore basic conversations.

$0 / month

  • Access to Grok (llama-3.3)
  • Up to 30 messages / day
  • Standard response speed
  • Text-only input

RECOMMENDED

Pro

Unlock full creative and analytical potential.

$15 / month

  • Priority access to all AI providers
  • Unlimited conversations & sessions
  • Voice input & file attachments
  • Ultra-fast generation times
  • Custom personal API keys support
  • Secure dashboard analytics
